subject: [PATCH v3 07/20] ntfs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for NTFS to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is generated using macros that wrap the iomap_iter_next() helper. This change does not introduce any functional changes and only updates the internal implementation of the iomap operations. The conversion is done for several functions: ntfs_read_iomap_ops, ntfs_zero_read_iomap_ops, ntfs_seek_iomap_ops, ntfs_write_iomap_ops, ntfs_page_mkwrite_iomap_ops, and ntfs_dio_iomap_ops.
